creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #10)
> Another thing that springs to mind is if a PORTVERSION bump is needed for
> all ports using USES=pgsql? What is the preferred pattern here?

No, because if you are using ports, and already have postgresql installed, you will not be forced to change version.

For people using binary packages, there will be a conflict, and they will need to dump/reload, or run pg_upgrade, it would be great if there was a pkg-upgrade script for the postgresql*-server ports...
